info.name: Workday Integration Workday Absence Management API
Workday Integration Retrieve eligible absence types for a worker

params.name: ID
params.description: The Workday ID of the resource

params.name: limit
params.description: The maximum number of objects in a single response (default 20, maximum 100)

params.name: offset
params.description: The zero-based index of the first object in a response collection

items.docs: Returns a collection of eligible absence types for the specified worker, based on their benefits enrollment and absence plan configuration.

info.name: Workday Integration Create a time off request for a worker

params.name: ID
params.description: The Workday ID of the resource

items.docs: Creates a time off request for the specified worker ID and initiates the approval business process.

info.name: Workday Integration Retrieve valid time off dates for a worker

params.name: ID
params.description: The Workday ID of the resource

params.name: startDate
params.description: Start date for the range of valid dates

params.name: endDate
params.description: End date for the range of valid dates

items.docs: Returns the valid dates on which the specified worker can request time off, based on their schedule and existing requests.

info.name: Workday Integration Retrieve leaves of absence for a worker

params.name: ID
params.description: The Workday ID of the resource

params.name: limit
params.description: The maximum number of objects in a single response (default 20, maximum 100)

params.name: offset
params.description: The zero-based index of the first object in a response collection

items.docs: Returns the leaves of absence records for the specified worker.

info.name: Workday Integration Retrieve a specific leave of absence for a worker

params.name: ID
params.description: The Workday ID of the resource

params.name: subresourceID
params.description: The Workday ID of the leave of absence

items.docs: Returns the specified leave of absence record for the worker.

info.name: Workday Integration Retrieve an absence plan balance

params.name: ID
params.description: The Workday ID of the resource

items.docs: Returns the specified balance of all absence plan and leave of absence types.

info.name: Workday Integration Retrieve leave status values

items.docs: Returns the available leave of absence status values.

info.name: Workday Integration Retrieve time off status values

items.docs: Returns the available time off request status values including Approved, Submitted, Not Submitted, and Sent Back.
